     the Fermi energy is    -0.5613 ev

!    total energy              =  -11770.57044936 Ry
     estimated scf accuracy    <          2.7E-09 Ry
     smearing contrib. (-TS)   =      -0.08839408 Ry
     internal energy E=F+TS    =  -11770.48205527 Ry

     The total energy is F=E-TS. E is the sum of the following terms:
     one-electron contribution = -239088.33353971 Ry
     hartree contribution      =  120641.11560119 Ry
     xc contribution           =   -4210.26564588 Ry
     ewald contribution        =  110890.01579038 Ry
     DFT-D3 Dispersion         =      -3.01426124 Ry

     total magnetization       =    43.90 Bohr mag/cell
     absolute magnetization    =    54.02 Bohr mag/cell

     convergence has been achieved in  39 iterations
